response.justification: Maria has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across stacks and domains, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and her German proficiency is only basic — a critical requirement for this client-facing, German-market role.
strengths: Strong open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Extensive full-stack experience across Linux, Python-adjacent (Node.js), and DLang
Proven mentorship through workshops, courses, and team knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise or formal IT architecture design leadership
Lacks documented experience managing cross-functional teams or advising clients on compliance/security
